response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including performance optimization and hardware-software co-design, but lacks direct experience with AI accelerators, deep neural network optimization, or SoC/IP modeling. His background in embedded systems and low-latency applications is relevant, but the gap in specialized AI hardware and performance architecture for accelerators is significant. His education aligns with the role’s technical requirements, but his professional focus has been broader rather than domain-specific.
strengths: Strong background in performance optimization and low-latency systems (e.g., real-time metadata handling, micro-services infrastructure)
Experience with hardware-software co-design (e.g., robotic arms, embedded systems, C/C++ development)
Proven track record in system architecture and developer tooling (e.g., MPC code generators, AI-agent infrastructure)
concerns: No explicit experience with AI accelerators, GPU architecture, or deep learning workload optimization
Lack of demonstrated work with SoC/IP modeling or hardware performance bottlenecks for AI workloads
Limited alignment with the role’s focus on cloud infrastructure for AI accelerators; professional history is more generalist software development
